title: Exthylanes Extra Stuff
description: A library with methods that Exthylane uses to make mods.
body:
# Features:
  - adds some math helper methods to get a block position from the Player's yaw and pitch.
  - adds some Block and Item registering methods.
  - adds a method to spawn Particles on every Client, withouth requiring Packets for syncing.
  - adds Entity registry helper methods. 
  - adds Coordinate conversion helper to convert 3d Coordinates to 2d screen coordinates.

### DOES NOTHING ON ITS OWN!!
